title: sphaerosepalaceae
intro: The Sphaerosepalaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. This family is characterized by its unique and distinctive features, often including globe-shaped or rounded sepals, which are modified leaves that protect the flowers. Sphaerosepalaceae typically comprises a small to moderate number of genera, often found in tropical and subtropical regions. The family Sphaerosepalaceae is an important part of the plant kingdom, offering valuable insights into plant diversity and evolution.
